mapper.select: SELECT client_code, client_name FROM client WHERE client_type='AC1'

SELECT prod_code, prod_name, unit FROM prod_common
WHERE prod_name LIKE '%'||#{prodName}||'%'

SELECT o.order_code, o.order_name, c.client_code, c.client_name, CASE WHEN COUNT(p.prod_name) = 1 THEN MIN(p.prod_name) ELSE MIN(p.prod_name) || '외 ' || (COUNT(p.prod_name) - 1) || '건' END AS prod_name, o.registration_date, o.due_date, CASE WHEN NVL(SUM(s.release_quantity), 0) = 0 THEN '등록' WHEN NVL(SUM(s.release_quantity), 0) < SUM(d.order_quantity) THEN '신청중' ELSE '완료' END AS status FROM orders o JOIN order_detail d ON o.order_code = d.order_code JOIN prod_common p ON d.prod_code = p.prod_code JOIN client c ON o.client_code = c.client_code LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT order_detail_code, SUM(release_quantity) release_quantity FROM prod_release GROUP BY order_detail_code) s ON d.order_detail_code = s.order_detail_code
AND o.order_code LIKE '%'||#{orderCode}||'%'
AND c.client_name LIKE '%'||#{clientName}||'%'
AND p.prod_name LIKE '%'||#{prodName}||'%'
AND o.order_name LIKE '%'||#{orderName}||'%'
GROUP BY o.order_code, o.order_name, c.client_code, c.client_name, o.registration_date, o.due_date ORDER BY status, TO_NUMBER(substr(order_code,7)) DESC

SELECT o.order_code, o.order_name, o.emp_code, e.emp_name, o.registration_date, o.due_date, c.client_code, c.client_name, o.note FROM orders o JOIN client c ON o.client_code= c.client_code JOIN emp e ON o.emp_code=e.emp_code WHERE o.order_code=#{orderCode}
SELECT o.order_detail_code, o.order_code, o.prod_code, p.prod_name, o.order_quantity, o.order_price FROM order_detail o JOIN prod_common p ON o.prod_code = p.prod_code WHERE o.order_code=#{orderCode}
SELECT 'ORDER-'||(NVL(MAX(order_num),0) + 1) order_code FROM ( SELECT TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(order_code, 7)) order_num FROM orders)
SELECT 'ORDER-DETAIL-'||(NVL(MAX(order_num),0) + 1) order_code FROM ( SELECT TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(order_detail_code, 14)) order_num FROM order_detail)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders(order_code, order_name, emp_code, registration_date, due_date, note, client_code) VALUES(#{orderCode}, #{orderName}, #{empCode}, #{registrationDate}, #{dueDate}, #{note}, #{clientCode} )

SELECT 'ORDER-DETAIL-'||(NVL(MAX(order_num),0) + 1) AS order_detail_code FROM ( SELECT TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(order_detail_code, 14)) AS order_num FROM order_detail )
INSERT INTO order_detail(order_detail_code, order_code, prod_code, order_quantity, order_price) VALUES (#{orderDetailCode}, #{orderCode}, #{prodCode}, #{orderQuantity}, #{orderPrice})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET order_name = #{orderName}, client_code = #{clientCode}, registration_date = #{registrationDate}, due_date = #{dueDate}, note = #{note} WHERE order_code = #{orderCode}
mapper.select:
SELECT o.order_code, o.order_name, FIND_PROD_NAME(d.prod_code) prod_name, FIND_CLIENT_NAME(o.client_code) client_name, FIND_EMP_NAME(o.emp_code) emp_name, o.registration_date, o.due_date, GET_MES_SUB_CODE_NAME(d.process_status) process_status, d.order_quantity, d.order_quantity-NVL(SUM(p.release_quantity),0) no_send, d.order_price*d.order_quantity total_price FROM orders o LEFT JOIN order_detail d ON (o.order_code=d.order_code) LEFT JOIN prod_release p ON (d.order_detail_code = p.order_detail_code)
AND o.order_code LIKE '%'||#{orderCode}||'%'
AND o.order_name LIKE '%'||#{orderName}||'%'
AND FIND_PROD_NAME(d.prod_code) LIKE '%'||#{prodName}||'%'
AND FIND_CLIENT_NAME(o.client_code) LIKE '%'||#{clientName}||'%'
AND FIND_EMP_NAME(o.emp_code) LIKE '%'||#{empName}||'%'
AND o.registration_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{registrationDate1}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{registrationDate2}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND o.due_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{dueDate1}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{dueDate2}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND GET_MES_SUB_CODE_NAME(d.process_status) LIKE '%'||#{processStatus}||'%'
GROUP BY o.order_code, o.order_name, FIND_CLIENT_NAME(o.client_code), FIND_EMP_NAME(o.emp_code), FIND_PROD_NAME(d.prod_code), o.registration_date, d.process_status, o.due_date, d.order_quantity, d.order_price*d.order_quantity ORDER BY d.process_status,o.registration_date DESC

SELECT o.order_code, o.order_name, c.client_code, c.client_name, CASE WHEN COUNT(p.prod_name) = 1 THEN MIN(p.prod_name) ELSE MIN(p.prod_name) || '외 ' || (COUNT(p.prod_name) - 1) || '건' END AS prod_name, o.registration_date, o.due_date, CASE WHEN (SELECT count(*) FROM manu_plan WHERE order_code = o.order_code)=0 THEN '요청' WHEN (SELECT count(*) FROM manu_plan WHERE order_code = o.order_code)>0 THEN '기등록된 주문' END AS status FROM orders o JOIN order_detail d ON o.order_code = d.order_code JOIN prod_common p ON d.prod_code = p.prod_code JOIN client c ON o.client_code = c.client_code LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT order_detail_code, SUM(release_quantity) release_quantity FROM prod_release GROUP BY order_detail_code) s ON d.order_detail_code = s.order_detail_code
AND o.order_code LIKE '%'||#{orderCode}||'%'
AND c.client_name LIKE '%'||#{clientName}||'%'
AND p.prod_name LIKE '%'||#{prodName}||'%'
AND o.order_name LIKE '%'||#{orderName}||'%'
GROUP BY o.order_code, o.order_name, c.client_code, c.client_name, o.registration_date, o.due_date ORDER BY status desc, order_code
